title: non-serializable class via deserialize function
description: mion registers a deserialize fn so the class instance can be reconstructed; without that registration, JSON yields a plain object.
notes: Class instance decodes to a plain object (asymmetric deserializedValues): the getFullName method is non-serializable and dropped, the instance prototype is not restored.
The startDate Date field round-trips via ISO string.
generated: function NzL_kCQwWAs(v){const cs_NonSerializableClass = utl.getClassSerializer('NonSerializableClass');if (cs_NonSerializableClass) return cs_NonSerializableClass.serialize(v); return {name:v.name,surname:v.surname,id:v.id,startDate:v.startDate.toISOString()}}
